image:image.image:title: Armaan Parvez — Product Designer
image:image.image:caption: Independent product designer for SaaS, web and mobile apps.

image:image.image:title: NutriFlow, Designing a Connected Nutrition Platform
image:image.image:caption: Case study: a nutrition mobile app rebuilt and a nutritionist dashboard designed from scratch, into one connected platform.

image:image.image:title: NutriFlow connected nutrition platform, hero composition
image:image.image:caption: Nutritionist dashboard alongside the redesigned client mobile app.

image:image.image:title: Nutritionist dashboard, client progress
image:image.image:caption: Weight, biometrics, macros, and the full 27 micronutrients with trend charts.

image:image.image:title: NutriFlow mobile app, meal logging
image:image.image:caption: Three meal-logging paths: photo plus AI, barcode scan, and nutrition label.

image:image.image:title: NutriFlow mobile app, biometric tracking
image:image.image:caption: Tracking ketones, glucose, mood, macros, and 27 micronutrients.

image:image.image:title: NutriFlow nutritionist dashboard, AI-assisted meal creation
image:image.image:caption: Generate meals across multiple diet styles with AI assistance.
